chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 115 – The Nazool (Arrival) of Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup>, may the Salawat of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> be upon them<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه صحيح عندي - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (354/ 5)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه صحيح عندي - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (354/ 5)
text: إِنَّ جَعْدَةَ بِنْتَ أَشْعَثَ بْنِ قَيْسٍ الْكِنْدِيِّ سَمَّتِ الْحَسَنَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ وَ سَمَّتْ مَوْلَاةً لَهُ فَأَمَّا مَوْلَاتُهُ فَقَاءَتِ السَّمَّ وَ أَمَّا الْحَسَنُ فَاسْتَمْسَكَ فِي بَطْنِهِ ثُمَّ انْتَفَطَ بِهِ فَمَاتَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Numan, from Sayf Bin Ameyra, from Abu Bakr Al Hazramy who said,

‘Jo’da Bin Ash’as Bin Qays Al-Kindy poisoned Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup> and poisoned a female slave of his<sup>asws</sup>. So, as for the female slave, she vomited the poison, and as for Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, so it stayed in his<sup>asws</sup> stomach, which caused swelling that killed him<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 2. Sa‘d ibn ‘Abdallah and ‘Abdallah ibn Ja‘far have narrated from Ibrahim ibn Mahziyar from his brother. Ali (ibn Mahziyar) from al-Hassan ibn Sa‘id from Muhammad ibn Sinan from ibn Muskan from abu basir from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “Al-Hassan ibn Ali (a.s.) passed away at the age of forty seven up to the year fifty (AH). He lived forty years after the death of the Holy Prophet (s.a).”
